A.evidence: Prose faithful but leaks TeX macro-glyphs (/circledot, /epsilon1, /lessorapproxeql, /defines) and misplaces the 'Jimmy Lei Ba' author block after the intro; every display equation (eqs 1-5, Thm 4.1 bound, Cor 4.2) is dropped as '<!-- formula-not-decoded -->'. Algorithm 1 block is complete and correct.

B.evidence: Clean faithful prose, correct author block and footnote, proper heading order. Algorithm 1 and equations rendered as good LaTeX, but the update line drops the hat (\sqrt{v_t} instead of \sqrt{\hat v_t}) and eq (4) omits the ^t in (1-\beta_2).

C.evidence: Prose is pervasively littered with '$\_{1}$'/'g$\_{t}$' subscript markup merged into words; Algorithm 1 Require block is truncated/garbled, section 2.1 is cut mid-sentence, and the Theorem 4.1 bound equation is corrupted (\widehat{\overline{t}}_{i,t}). Some display equations are present in usable LaTeX.

D.evidence: Faithful prose with correct Adam italics and author block; full correct Algorithm 1 LaTeX code block (keeps \sqrt{\widehat{v}_t}) and all equations numbered with \tag including correct eq (4) (1-\beta_2^t). Only nit: one \tilde{m}_t typo for \hat.
